nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: Relying solely on own ideas without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to brainstorm activities for someone I support

nodes.label: AI as extension of self
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement leading to skill loss
nodes.grounding_span: I am happy to use AI as an extension of my own abilities

nodes.label: Organizational infrastructure enabling AI use
nodes.grounding_span: this would also require the company to introduce things like tablet computers

nodes.label: AI verifiability and accuracy
nodes.label_negative: AI for tasks where verification is difficult
nodes.grounding_span: I would double check online that the information about the activities is up to date

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I am less keen on the idea of losing skills I already have

nodes.label: Effective support for care recipients
nodes.grounding_span: found that it was useful for finding ideas that met the needs of the person

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in work
nodes.grounding_span: If we switched from paperwork to using devices like tablets or phones then I could see AI becoming a useful tool

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to brainstorm activities for someone I support and found that it was useful

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: It's 50/50. By analogy, it's good to have a calculator but it's also good to be able to do arithmetic

nodes.label: Frustration with organizational and IT barriers
nodes.grounding_span: I do the paperwork simply because it is out of my control to be able to introduce AI into the workflow

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I would probably go back and forth to refine the suggestions, and I would double check online

nodes.label: Pragmatic adaptation to institutional constraints
nodes.grounding_span: I do the paperwork simply because it is out of my control to be able to introduce AI into the workflow
